title: add_prime_sum
subject:
Write a program that takes one argument: a positive integer N. It prints the sum of every prime number that is less than or equal to N, followed by a newline.

If the number of arguments is not exactly 1, or the number is negative, print just a newline (treat that as 0 only if you choose to). Use atoi-style parsing.

Examples:
  $ ./a.out 5
  10
  $ ./a.out 7
  17
